scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/index.js --target node && bun build src/analyst.ts --outfile dist/analyst.js --target node && bun build src/cli/sync-history.ts --outfile dist/sync-history.js --target node && bun build src/cli/weekend-optimize.ts --outfile dist/weekend-optimize.js --target node && bun build src/cli/backtest.ts --outfile dist/backtest.js --target node
